query: I'm running PCA on a customer feature dataset to find the top components and visualize structure. What baselines do I need?
expected_behavior: Does NOT force a Dummy / Logistic / RandomForest baseline ladder onto an unsupervised dimensionality-reduction task
Explains that supervised baselines apply when there is a target / label; PCA without a downstream supervised task does not have the same kind of baseline

Recommends the relevant unsupervised sanity checks — e.g. variance-explained per component, scree plot, Kaiser criterion / eigenvalue > 1, or comparison to a permuted-data PCA — instead of supervised baselines
